creator: naddy@mips.inka.de
text:
Joseph S. Atkinson:

> # kldload sem

Indeed, that fixes it.  I now see that it is mentioned in pkg-message,
but this isn't displayed when you install from source.

Maybe add ${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE} to post-install?

-- 
Christian "naddy" Weisgerber                          naddy@mips.inka.de
